scripts.migrate:latest: NODE_ENV=production node ./scripts/packageSharedMigrations.js && NODE_ENV=production node ./node_modules/knex/bin/cli.js --knexfile knexfile.js --env production migrate:latest
scripts.migrate:rollback:prod: NODE_ENV=production node ./scripts/packageSharedMigrations.js && NODE_ENV=production node ./node_modules/knex/bin/cli.js --knexfile knexfile.js --env production migrate:rollback
scripts.seed:run:prod: NODE_ENV=production node ./scripts/packageSharedMigrations.js && NODE_ENV=production node ./node_modules/knex/bin/cli.js --knexfile knexfile.js --env production seed:run
